text: Wait, are you serious? They actually gave me the lead role? I was sure they would pick someone else! This is unbelievable!
speaker: Emma

text: I just found out that my flight got cancelled and there are no alternatives until tomorrow. I had promised my daughter I would be there for her recital tonight.
speaker: Robert

text: You knew about this for weeks and you didn't tell me? I had to find out from a stranger at the office. That is completely unacceptable.
speaker: Diana

text: I keep hearing noises from the basement at night. Last night I went down to check and the door was wide open even though I locked it before bed.
speaker: Marcus

text: Oh well, I guess the meeting is at 3 PM. Let me check my calendar to confirm the time and the room number.
speaker: Sarah

text: I cannot believe they served that to us. The meat was clearly spoiled and the waiter just laughed when I pointed it out. Absolutely revolting.
speaker: Chen

text: Actually, now that I think about it, maybe this is a blessing in disguise. Losing that job freed me up to finally pursue what I actually love doing.
speaker: Jordan

text: I miss her so much. Every time I walk past her favorite coffee shop, I remember how she used to order the same thing every single morning without fail.
speaker: Lily

text: The kids put together a surprise party for my birthday. When I walked in, everyone yelled surprise and I almost dropped my groceries. Then I saw the cake they made themselves and I just started crying happy tears.
speaker: Thomas

text: You have got to be kidding me. After all the overtime I put in, they promoted someone who has been here for three months. Three months! I have been here for five years.
speaker: Priya
